title: Multiple times zoom in/out
scenario: QSG Quick Start Guide does not crash or exhibit UI issues when performing multiple zoom in/out operations using the circle button across various screens
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
3. Locate and tap on the Quick Start Guide (QSG) option.
4. On the QSG screen, use the circle button to zoom in on the displayed content.
5. Use the circle button again to zoom out on the displayed content.
6. Repeat steps 4-5 multiple times (e.g., 5-10 times) to simulate rapid zoom in/out operations.
7. Navigate to a different screen within the QSG (e.g., swipe to the next page or section).
8. Repeat steps 4-6 on the new QSG screen.
9. Continue navigating through various QSG screens and performing multiple zoom in/out operations on each.
10. After completing the zoom operations across all QSG screens, return to the Home screen.
11. Verify that the app remains responsive and no crashes or UI issues (e.g., freezing, graphical glitches, unresponsive elements) have occurred.
expected: The app remains stable and responsive throughout the zoom in/out operations across all QSG screens. No crashes, freezes, or UI glitches occur.
